_note: Model-robustness row pins (PLAN.md's open question, resolved by user decision: GPT-5.1 + Llama 4 Maverick via a hosted inference API). Only 'claude' has a working agent/llm_client.py backend (AnthropicLLMClient). gpt and open_weight are recorded here so the config grid is complete and reproducible, but run.py skips any cell whose model has implemented:false with an explicit notice rather than guessing at an OpenAI or Together AI client implementation -- building those backends is separate scope from wiring the fairness lock.
